reviews.review_msg: Very helpful and approachable professor! She makes concepts fun and explains everything clearly and in a way that's easy to understand. Always supportive and open to questions.

As her TA, I had the chance to see firsthand how dedicated and supportive she is. She's very nice, extremely approachable, and always willing to help. She makes concepts fun and explains them clearly so students can truly understand the material.

Sevda explained course concepts in class very clearly, and the readings complemented her lectures. The group project took place over the course of the term with clear checkpoints, to ensure nobody falls behind. Her exams were extremely fair. She was very caring and willing to help whenever needed.

Sevda is very knowledgeable about each subject that is discussed in class and you can see the prep that goes into each lecture. She cares about her students success in the class, provides detailed instructions for each assignment and provides clear feedback.

Professor Sattari was really motivated to tailor her teaching style to the individual needs of students and actively worked to implement student feedback. Plenty of in-class activities and opportunities to ask questions. Overall amazing prof, really invested in the learning of her students!
